sentences.target: Die Baustelle könnte den Verkehr behindern.

translations.de: Die Baustelle könnte den Verkehr behindern.
translations.en: The construction site could slow traffic.
translations.es: La obra podría ralentizar el tráfico.
translations.fr: Le chantier pourrait ralentir la circulation.
translations.it: Il cantiere potrebbe rallentare il traffico.
translations.ko: 공사 현장 때문에 교통이 지연될 수 있어요.
translations.yue: 個地盤可能會阻住交通。
translations.pt: A obra pode deixar o trânsito mais lento.
translations.he: אתר הבנייה עלול להאט את התנועה.
translations.vi: Công trường có thể làm giao thông chậm lại.
translations.ar: موقع البناء قد يبطئ حركة المرور.
translations.nl: De bouwplaats kan het verkeer vertragen.
translations.hi: निर्माण स्थल ट्रैफिक को धीमा कर सकता है।
translations.el: Το εργοτάξιο μπορεί να επιβραδύνει την κίνηση.
translations.id: Lokasi konstruksi bisa memperlambat lalu lintas.
translations.ja: 工事で交通が遅くなるかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; marks the subject noun phrase 'Die Baustelle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present subjunctive (Konjunktiv II), 3rd person singular; expresses possibility and selects the bare infinitive 'behindern'.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; marks the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'behindern'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'könnte', taking the accusative object 'den Verkehr'.

translations.en: Your boxes are blocking the entrance.
translations.es: Tus cajas están bloqueando la entrada.
translations.pt: As suas caixas estão bloqueando a entrada.
translations.vi: Các thùng của bạn đang chặn lối vào.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे बक्से प्रवेश द्वार को रोक रहे हैं।
translations.el: Τα κουτιά σου εμποδίζουν την είσοδο.
translations.ja: あなたの箱が入口をふさいдеいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), nominative plural; modifies the subject noun 'Kisten'.
Common noun, plural; syntactic subject agreeing with finite verb 'behindern'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; predicates the action performed by 'Deine Kisten'.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; marks the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'behindern'.

sentences.target: Die Autos dürfen uns nicht behindern.

translations.de: Die Autos dürfen uns nicht behindern.
translations.en: The cars are not allowed to block us.
translations.fr: Les voitures n'ont pas le droit de nous bloquer.
translations.pt: Os carros não podem bloquear nossa passagem.
translations.he: אסור למכוניות לחסום לנו את הדרך.
translations.vi: Xe hơi không được chặn đường chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Auto's mogen onze doorgang niet blokkeren.
translations.uk: Автомобілям не можна перекривати нам шлях.
translations.hu: Az autók nem zárhatják el az utunkat.
translations.hi: गाड़ियों को हमारा रास्ता रोकने की अनुमति नहीं है।
translations.pl: Samochodom nie wolno blokować nam drogi.
translations.el: Τα αυτοκίνητα δεν επιτρέπεται να μας κλείνουν τον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Bilene har ikke lov til å sperre veien for oss.
translations.id: Mobil tidak boleh menghalangi jalan kami.
translations.sv: Bilarna får inte blockera vår väg.
translations.ro: Mașinilor nu le este permis să ne blocheze drumul.
translations.da: Bilerne må ikke spærre vejen for os.
translations.ja: 車は私たちの進路をふさいではいけません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; marks the subject noun phrase 'Die Autos'.
Common noun, plural; syntactic subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person plural; selects the bare infinitive 'behindern' and expresses permission/allowability.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; direct object of 'behindern'.
Negation particle; scopes over the verbal predicate to negate 'dürfen … behindern'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'dürfen', taking the accusative object 'uns'.

sentences.target: Ich will dich bei der Arbeit nicht behindern.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl dɪç baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t nɪçt bəˈhɪndɐn/

translations.de: Ich will dich bei der Arbeit nicht behindern.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl dɪç baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t nɪçt bəˈhɪndɐn/
translations.en: I don't want to get in your way at work.
translations.es: No quiero estorbarte en el trabajo.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas te gêner au travail.
translations.ko: 일하는 데 방해가 되고 싶지 않아요.
translations.ru: Я не хочу мешать тебе на работе.
translations.pt: Não quero te atrapalhar no trabalho.
translations.he: אני לא רוצה להפריע לך בעבודה.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn cản trở bạn trong công việc.
translations.ar: لا أريد أن أعيقك في العمل.
translations.nl: Ik wil je niet in de weg zitten op je werk.
translations.uk: Я не хочу тобі заважати на роботі.
translations.hi: मैं काम पर तुम्हारे रास्ते में नहीं आना चाहता।
translations.pl: Nie chcę ci przeszkadzać w pracy.
translations.el: Δεν θέλω να σε εμποδίζω στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke være vидah for deg på jobb.
translations.id: Aku tidak mau mengganggu kamu saat bekerja.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte vara i vägen för dig på jobbet.
translations.ro: Nu vreau să te încurc la muncă.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke stå i vejen for dig på arbejdet.
translations.ja: あなたの仕事の邪魔をしたくありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'behindern' and expresses volition.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, accusative (informal); direct object of 'behindern'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces the prepositional phrase 'bei der Arbeit' indicating circumstance/location.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; within the PP headed by 'bei'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'bei' in dative, forming the PP 'bei der Arbeit'.
Negation particle; negates the predicate 'will … behindern'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will', taking the accusative object 'dich'.

Die Autos dürfen uns nicht behindern.
Ich will dich bei der Arbeit nicht behindern.

Your boxes are blocking the entrance.
The cars are not allowed to block us.
I don't want to get in your way at work.
